title: psilogramme hispidula
intro: Psilogramme hispidula, also known as the hairy psilogramme, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Psilogramme hispidula include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Psilogramme hispidula include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be made by boiling the leaves in water or applying crushed leaves directly to affected areas.
